findings.description: The docs/about-us/ directory was created but contains zero files. There is no cohesive narrative section covering who Common Bond is, who Ryan is (narrative first), what Receptor does, where Common Bond currently stands operationally, and what the aims are.

tasks.description: Create docs/about-us/_category_.json with sidebar label, position 0, and generated-index link.
Create docs/about-us/index.md as the hub page with card grid linking to sub-pages and a TL;DR summary.

Create docs/about-us/founder.md as a narrative-first personal profile of Dr Ryan Ammendolea. Include headshot placeholder, origin story, dual clinical/engineering identity, personal vision statement. Link to strategy/strategy-vision/founder.md for full credentials.

Create docs/about-us/who-we-are.md covering: Common Bond Pty Ltd (ACN 694 840 394, trustee for Ammendolea Family Trust ABN 50 152 085 287), MyJMO Pty Ltd (ACN 648 051 852, IP owner), software licence relationship between entities, solo-founder EOS operating model, four brand pillars, technology philosophy.

Create docs/about-us/what-we-do.md covering Receptor product suite (Workforce, Planner, Preferencer, Allocator), the problem solved, the SaaS+Consulting flywheel, in/out-of-scope boundaries. Cross-link to strategy/strategy-vision/vision.md.

Create docs/about-us/where-we-are.md: honest current-state page covering pre-revenue active development stage, quarterly rocks (FY2026 Q1), product readiness, StartSpace community context, solo-founder reality, and active relationship-building with PMCV (piqued interest via Monash Health, not yet formalised).

Create docs/about-us/our-aims.md covering 1yr (FY2026 Monash pilot + first 3 SaaS clients), 3yr (FY2028 $250k+ ARR, Victoria+SA+WA), and 10yr (national standard for all healthcare trainee allocations). Cross-link to operations/eos/vto.md and strategy/strategy-vision/vision.md.

findings.description: No aboutUsSidebar autogenerated entry exists in sidebars.ts. Without this, the docs/about-us/ directory will not be wired into Docusaurus navigation.

tasks.description: Add aboutUsSidebar autogenerated entry for dirName 'about-us' to sidebars.ts.

findings.description: No navbar item exists for the About Us section. The section is unreachable from top-level navigation without this entry.

tasks.description: Add a top-level 'About Us' navbar item in docusaurus.config.ts pointing at the aboutUsSidebar, positioned before the Business dropdown.

findings.description: No narrative technology overview exists in the about-us section. Advisors, partners, and future hires need a non-technical summary of how Receptor is built (Supabase, Cloudflare, OR-Tools, Python match-backend) to understand our build quality and architectural choices without reading the engineering docs.

tasks.description: Create docs/about-us/our-technology.md as a non-technical summary of the Receptor technology stack: Supabase (Postgres, Auth, Realtime), Cloudflare (Pages, Workers, edge delivery), OR-Tools (Google constraint solver for the matching engine), Python match-backend microservice, and Next.js/Flutter frontends. Explain the 'why' behind each choice in plain language.

findings.description: The about-us section has no chronological narrative of how Common Bond came to be. A timeline showing the journey from engineering career through clinical training to founding Receptor provides credibility and human context that prose alone cannot convey.

tasks.description: Add a Mermaid timeline diagram to docs/about-us/founder.md (or index.md) showing key milestones: 2005 (engineering career start), 2007–2010 (BSc Internetworking, Murdoch University), 2008–2020 (St John Ambulance volunteer), 2016–2019 (MD, Notre Dame), 2020 (internship, Fiona Stanley & Fremantle Hospitals), 2021–2022 (Critical Care HMO, Monash Health), 2023 (ICU Registrar + Receptor v1 + Monash ICU Survival Guide), 2024 (Receptor public launch), 2026 (first major pilot).

findings.description: The legal entity table on who-we-are.md should include ASIC ACN numbers alongside ABN for completeness. Confirmed: MyJMO Pty Ltd ACN 648 051 852; Common Bond Pty Ltd ACN 694 840 394. These are public ASIC records and strengthen professional credibility.

tasks.description: Include ACN numbers in the legal entity table on docs/about-us/who-we-are.md: MyJMO Pty Ltd ACN 648 051 852 (IP Owner); Common Bond Pty Ltd ACN 694 840 394 (Exclusive Licensee, Trustee for Ammendolea Family Trust ABN 50 152 085 287).

findings.description: All planned about-us pages lack a 'description:' frontmatter field. Docusaurus uses this for SEO meta descriptions and for the generated-index card summaries on the category landing page. Without it, the index page cards show no descriptions.

tasks.description: Ensure all 7 about-us markdown files include a 'description:' frontmatter field (1–2 sentences, SEO-friendly). This populates both Docusaurus meta tags and the generated-index card previews.

findings.description: The site homepage (intro.md) has no link or reference to the About Us section. A new visitor or advisor entering via the homepage cannot discover who Common Bond is without navigating the sidebar or navbar independently.

tasks.description: Add an 'About Us' entry to the Corporate Framework section of docs/intro.md, linking to ./about-us/ with a brief one-line description.

clarifications.decision: Include both MyJMO Pty Ltd (ACN 648 051 852, IP Owner) and Common Bond Pty Ltd (ACN 694 840 394, Exclusive Licensee, Trustee for Ammendolea Family Trust ABN 50 152 085 287). Document the software licence relationship between entities.
Include StartSpace as a community affiliation on where-we-are.md. StartSpace is an open community of early-stage founders powered by State Library Victoria.

We have NO existing formal relationship with PMCV. We are actively working to build one. Monash Health work has piqued PMCV interest. Do not overstate — describe as relationship-building in progress, not an established relationship.
Mostly structured/professional, but occasional personal and candid statements are appropriate — especially on where-we-are.md and founder.md.
Leave a <!-- TODO: add headshot image path --> placeholder comment in founder.md where the image would appear.
Approved. Create docs/about-us/our-technology.md as a non-technical narrative technology overview.
Approved. Add a Mermaid timeline covering the full journey from 2005 engineering career to 2026 pilot. Place on founder.md.
Approved. ACNs confirmed: MyJMO Pty Ltd ACN 648 051 852; Common Bond Pty Ltd ACN 694 840 394.
Approved. All about-us pages must include a description: frontmatter field.
Approved. Add About Us to the Corporate Framework section of intro.md.

implementationPhases.rationale: All content creation tasks — the 8 about-us markdown files including our-technology.md. INFO-05, INFO-06, INFO-07 are satisfied within the same files created by INFO-01 and INFO-04 (founder.md, who-we-are.md, and frontmatter respectively).
Navigation and cross-linking: sidebar wiring, navbar entry, and intro.md homepage link. Applied after content files are in place.
